---
title: "Blog post title"
description: "A short catchy description of the blog post"
author: 
  - name: Jordan Sibley 
    url: http://jordancsibley.github.io/
    affiliation: MEDS 
    affiliation-url: https://bren.ucsb.edu/masters-programs/master-environmental-data-science
    
date: 2024-10-18
categories: [Quarto, MEDS]
toc: true
bibliography: references.bib
csl: plos-computational-biology.csl
image: sci-first-post.jpeg
citation: 
  url: http://jordancsibley.github.io/posts/2014-10-18-my-first-post/
draft: true # prevents post from showing up until you are ready 
---

## This is my first section.

I'm going to insert a footnote here[^1]

[^1]: Here is a new footnote

## This is my second

Here's my next paragraph[^2]

[^2]: Here is my second footnote

Im citing [@csik2022]

Im going to site a journal article now[@gaynor2022].

Look you can add code too!
```{r}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| echo: false

library(tidyverse)
library(palmerpenguins)

ggplot(palmerpenguins::penguins, aes(x = flipper_length_mm))+
  geom_bar()
```
